channel.title: Low Level on rena mice.
channel.description: Recent content in Low Level on rena mice.

item.title: Hack Assembler
item.description: Full code can be found at github. It had been quite some time since I started off the Nand2Tetris Part I course on coursera. Because I wasn’t paying for it I wasn’t under the pressure of finishing the assignments but I still wanted to do it anyways but the last week’s assignment was kind of a daunting task for some reason. They ask you to build an assembler for the hack assembly, which the computer that you build throughout the course utilizes, and they also provide a complete breakdown of the logic, design, and tips on how to approach it.
